content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: hdr_override authz_bypass ∧ spoof(x-user-id) ⇒ drop_hdr ∧ sess_only
P: req.headers['x-user-id'] || session.userId → session.userId
V: spoof(x-user-id) ∧ authz_bypass ∧ 401
R: ! High: client-controlled `x-user-id` can override session identity and bypass authz; verify gateway preserves/scrubs `x-user-id` and force session-only lookup.
A: restore session.userId; reject/ignore `x-user-id`; keep `401` on missing session
